result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates transitive third-party license notice

Usage:
  ThirdLicense [options]

Options:
  --project <project> (REQUIRED)  Project file to analyze third-parties
  --endpoint <endpoint>           Additional NuGet repository endpoint
  --output <output> (REQUIRED)    Path to the output file [default: THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.TXT]
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
  --version                       Show version information

  --version                       Show version information
